case_title: AVAZBEK ORTIKOV VS. ROBERT LISTE POQUEZ

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-05-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-03-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN UNABLE TO SERVE DEFENDANT SINCE THE OPENING OF HIS CLAIM ON OCTOBER 19, 2019. PLAINTIFF'S STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS EXPIRED. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES ARE ALLOWED. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
